limitations: Curvature action is represented by existing operator channels; full H_T theorem dependencies remain downstream.
No final-paper claim follows from this local formula closure alone.

rows.conclusion: curvature action maps to existing lepton-sector operator terms
rows.limitation: Does not prove the full H_T theorem.

rows.conclusion: curvature action maps to existing up-sector operator terms
rows.limitation: Does not alter frozen up-sector predictions.

rows.conclusion: curvature action maps to existing down-sector operator terms
rows.limitation: Does not alter frozen down-sector predictions.

rows.conclusion: chirality action maps to V_chi and lift/projector channels
rows.limitation: Mirror theorem remains a downstream dependency.

rows.conclusion: no new independent curvature acts on the formal lepton/up/down kernel
rows.limitation: Formal kernel theorem remains separately audited.

rows.conclusion: no new lower-bound term is added to H_perp
mirror channels map to chiral/Higgs-U1/boundary representation
rows.limitation: Mirror exclusion is not re-proven here.

rows.conclusion: Hopf/base/fiber curvature maps to A0, V_Hopf, and V_boundary
rows.limitation: No independent mixed coefficient is introduced.

rows.conclusion: Higgs-U1 curvature maps to V_Hopf and V_boundary

title: BHSM v2.9 Lichnerowicz Curvature Action Report
